title: Jakarta Losing Patience with Inpex over 26-Year Masela Gas Block Delay
body: Indonesia warns Japan’s Inpex to act on the long-delayed Masela gas project or face expulsion.

title: Enggartiasto: Energy Transformation Relies on Ideas and Collaboration, Not Just Pipes and Cables
body: B-Universe Chairman Enggartiasto Lukita stresses media’s crucial role in driving dialogue and collaboration for Indonesia’s energy future.

title: Indonesia Says China Walks the Talk on Nickel Investment, Unlike Europe and US
body: Energy Minister Bahlil Lahadalia says Chinese investors actually execute their investment proposals.

title: Indonesia Airlines CEO: 'Our Airline Is Real and It’s Taking Off Soon'
body: Indonesia Airlines defies 'hoax' claim by regulator, pushes ahead with launch by year-end backed by global investors.

title: 'No Child Should Study in Darkness': Minister Vows Equal Energy Access
body: “Let’s admit that our energy conversations have become too fancy, too complex. Sometimes, even I don’t understand them,” he said.

title: Indonesia to Begin Reducing Fuel Imports from Singapore 'Soon'
body: Indonesia intends to shift its fuel imports from Singapore to the Middle East, Energy Minister Bahlil Lahadalia says.

title: Energy Ministry and B-Universe Host National Energy and Mineral Forum in Jakarta
body: Participants engage in discussions about the opportunities and challenges facing Indonesia’s energy and mineral sectors.

title: ASEAN Wants to Meet Trump as Clock Ticks on Tariffs
body: Malaysia's Anwar Ibrahim had penned a letter to Trump in hopes the latter would agree to meet with the ASEAN members over tariffs.

title: Indonesia, China Ink Deals to Boost Local Currency Use and Expand Bilateral Cooperation
body: The two monetary authorities previously agreed on local currency swaps worth up to 400 billion yuan ($55 billion).

title: Prabowo: China Is Indonesia’s Strategic Partner in Trade and Technology
body: Prabowo described Chinese businesspeople as committed and willing to align with Indonesia’s values and socio-economic conditions.

title: German Logistics Giant Makes Biodiesel Mandatory for Indonesian Fleet
body: Rhenus makes biodiesel mandatory for its Indonesia fleet, citing availability, local fit, and fast-track to net-zero emissions goals.

title: Benzoin Resin Touted as Next Big Commodity in Indonesia’s Downstream Strategy
body: Luhut Pandjaitan says benzoin resin, or kemenyan, holds untapped potential for Indonesia’s downstream strategy and rural economic growth.

title: Trump Threatens 50% Tariffs on EU, 25% on Apple iPhones Made Abroad
body: Trump threatens 50% tariffs on EU goods and 25% on Apple products unless iPhones are made in the US, escalating his trade war.

title: Shell’s Exit from Indonesia Fuel Retail Not a Sign of Energy Sector Decline, Says Minister
body: Energy Minister Bahlil Lahadalia says Shell’s sale of Indonesian fuel stations is a normal business move, not a worsening energy sector.

title: IDX Studies Longer Trading Hours, Emulates NYSE’s 24-Hour Market Plan
body: Indonesia Stock Exchange considers adding a third trading session, mirroring NYSE’s 24-hour trading review to boost market activity.

title: Indonesia Already Spends $184.8 Million on Kids' Meals
body: For this year alone, the government has set aside Rp 71 trillion of state money to serve the meals, but is open to raising the budget.

title: Gov't Urges Pertamina to Import US Fuel 'No Matter What'
body: Indonesia is mulling raising its fuel imports from the US as part of its tariff negotiations.

title: 'Investment, Not Tariffs,' Says Ishiba after Telephone Talks with Trump
body: Ishiba said he reminded Trump that Japan's position was for the US administration to scrap all recent tariffs on imports from Japan.

title: New Customs Chief Djaka Budhi Utama Confirmed Retired from Military Service
body: Active-duty military personnel are only allowed to hold civilian positions in 14 designated ministries and/or agencies.

title: Shell to Exit Fuel Retail Business in Indonesia, Sells Stations to JV
body: The company stressed that the change in ownership will not affect Shell’s lubricants business in Indonesia.

title: Bimo Wijayanto Officially Appointed as Indonesia’s New Director General of Taxes
body: Bimo was one of 22 senior officials sworn in on the same day to assume echelon I leadership positions within the Ministry of Finance.

title: Emergency Reserves, High Prices, Rationing -- How Did Japan's Rice Crisis Get This Far?
body: To cope with shortfalls this year, the government has released rice reserves. But the grain has been slow to reach supermarket shelves.

body: “The narrative that LG pulled out of the consortium is inaccurate," the minister said.

title: IDX Urges Delisting of Sritex After Bankruptcy, CEO’s Arrest
body: Sritex (SRIL) was declared bankrupt in October 2024, and its former CEO, Iwan Setiawan Lukminto, was arrested earlier this week.

title: China’s Huayou to Break Ground on Indonesian EV Battery Project before August
body: Huayou officially replaces LG Energy Solution in Indonesia's EV battery ecosystem megaproject, Energy Minister Bahlil Lahadalia says.

title: Mongolia in Talks to Export Halal Meat to Indonesia
body: Indonesia still relies on foreign supplies for its meat, and Mongolia is seeing dollar signs.

title: Indonesia to Issue SDG Bond So It Doesn’t Rely on Foreign Investors for Housing Program

title: Prabowo Vows Energy Reform, Threatens to Fire Officials Blocking Investment
body: Prabowo pushes energy reform, threatens to fire slow officials, backs new investments to slash $40B annual import bill.

title: Indonesia Spends $40 Billion Annually on Energy Imports, Prabowo Pushes for Energy Independence

title: Indonesian Sovereign Fund Danantara to Partner with China, Japan, Malaysia

title: Bank Indonesia Cuts 2025 Growth Forecast After Weak Q1 Performance
body: Bank Indonesia cuts 2025 growth forecast to 4.6–5.4 pct due to weak Q1 data and global slowdown, urges stronger domestic demand policies.

title: It Can Be Hard for ASEAN to Set Common Negotiation Plan on US Tariffs
body: An economist says that each ASEAN member is at a different stage of development, making a common US tariff negotiation plan impossible.

title: Bank Indonesia Cuts Benchmark Rate by 25 Basis Points to 5.5 Pct
body: Bank Indonesia cuts benchmark rate by 25 bps to 5.5% to support growth, citing stable inflation and manageable rupiah pressures.

title: Sell in May? JCI’s Losing Streak Gives Investors Reason to Pause
body: JCI’s May slump mirrors the ‘Sell in May and Go Away’ trend, with analysts urging caution amid repeated mid-year market weakness.

title: Indonesia Revives Boeing-Garuda Deal Amid Tariff Talks
body: Indonesia’s Danantara reopens talks with Boeing to revive a stalled deal with Garuda as Jakarta seeks closer US trade ties.

title: Indonesia to Impose Export Levy on Whole Coconuts to Curb Soaring Prices
body: Indonesia plans a levy on whole coconut exports to ease local supply woes as prices soar and processors face raw material shortages.

title: Prabowo Appoints New Tax and Customs Chiefs as Revenue Slides
body: Bimo Wijayanto, a senior bureaucrat at the Coordinating Ministry for the Economy, will replace Suryo Utomo as Director General of Taxes.

title: Shares in China's CATL, World's Biggest EV Battery Maker, Surge in Hong Kong after $4.6B IPO
body: CATL held a nearly 38 percent global market share for EV batteries in 2024, its listing documents showed.
